example: Talking on the phone can be really intimidating.
zh: 令人害怕的；使人畏縮的
ja: 威圧的な、怖気づかせる

example: He would need to authorize you to make the appointment.
ja: 許可する、権限を与える

example: Does he just need to hop on the phone and say yes?
ja: さっと乗る、すぐに行動する

example: Let me ask real quick if you don't mind.
ja: すごく短時間で（口語表現）

example: Please hold while I check that for you.
Thank you for holding. I'll be right back.
ja: お待ちいただきありがとうございます

example: Don't slack off on your studies.

zh: 健康保險攜帶與責任法案（醫療隱私保護法）
ja: 医療保険の携帯性と責任に関する法律（医療プライバシー保護）

example: He will be paying out of pocket for the visit.
I just want to give you a heads up about the cost.
ja: 事前に知らせる、注意を促す

example: You're looking at about 75 dollars for the exam.
I'll go with the steak and salad, please.
No, that's it. I'm finished ordering.
ja: それで全部です、終わりです
